Game.Name: Gambling Hourouki (Japan)
Game.plot: Gamble Hourouki is a Miscellaneous game, published by Vap,which was released in Japan in 1996.
Game.Notes: Gambling Hourouki ("Gambling Travelogue") is a board game/gambling game hybrid published by Vap. Up to four players move around a board, taking part in various gambling mini-games. Depending on their performance in the mini-game they might win or lose money from their total earnings, and this total needs to be higher than their competitors.
